case_title: MOHFEI GEH VS. KIMBERLY STEWART ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-05-2022 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL REQUESTED BY DEFENDANT, DARRAH HOWARD **GRANTED**
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NO AMOUNT GIVEN) SERVED APR-22-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HOWARD, DARNAGH
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD 5/31/22. CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO MICHAEL HANOVER-INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT HOWARD, DARNAGH
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-30-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-05-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GEH, MOHFEI AS TO DEFENDANT STEWART, KIMBERLY HOWARD, DARNAGH HANOVER, MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-18-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-18-2022 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUN-30-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506, DUE TO THE UNAVAILABILITY OF A JUDICIAL OFFICER TO HEAR TODAY'S MATTER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT WERE NOTIFED ON 5-17-22 BY TELEPHONE OF TODAY'S CONTINUANCE. PLAINTIFF MOHFEI GEE IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT KIMBERLY STEWART IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS HOWARD DARNAGH AND MICHAEL HANOVER ARE NOT PRESENT. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-05-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-05-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF MOHFEI GEH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KIMBERLY STEWART IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DARRAGH HOWARD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MICHAEL CHANOVER IS PRESENT VIA PHONE CALL. DEFENDANT KIMBERLY STEWART IS AUTHORIZED TO SPEAK ON BEHALF OF ALL DEFENDANTS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NO AMOUNT GIVEN) SERVED APR-22-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STEWART, KIMBERLY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GEH, MOHFEI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HANOVER, MICHAEL $100.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $100.00, CASE AGAINST DEFENDANT STEWART AND HOWARD IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF. $100.00 FOR THE GAFF HOOK. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:NO AMOUNT GIVEN) SERVED APR-22-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HANOVER, MICHAEL
